whatIsReal: Supabase project exists with 88 tables across 14 migrations
RLS properly configured — all tables require authenticated admin role
Auth flow works — users must authenticate via Supabase Auth
Supabase client library correctly set up — anon key only
Edge functions exist — hermes-chat and hermes-search deployed
Python scripts can write to Supabase when env credentials present
Research engine runs on schedule via launchd agents
whatIsNotReal: All dashboard data is static — 15 sections read bundled JS/JSON files
Ray Review approvals are localStorage-only — not persisted to server
Hermes cannot query Supabase — returns honest not-available stub
Hermes cannot search the internet — returns honest not-configured message
Dashboard badges are hardcoded — 64 cards, 50 candidates, 9 offers are static
Reports are baked markdown — not generated from live data
System health items are static — fixed statuses, not live checks
Trading demo is fully inline — strategies are array literals in JSX

blockers.title: No Active UI Component Queries Supabase
blockers.detail: src/services/db.ts exists with full query capability but no active component imports it

blockers.title: Ray Review Approvals Not Persisted
blockers.detail: RayReviewCenter.jsx saves decisions to localStorage only; no Supabase write

blockers.title: Hermes Has No Backend Context Endpoint
blockers.detail: hermesSupabaseContextAdapter.ts is a stub; no Netlify function exists

blockers.title: Research Engine Does Not Write to Supabase from Frontend
blockers.detail: Python scripts write local JSON; Supabase inserts are server-side conditional
